answers: Personal brand = how others perceive your professional identity. Intentionally shape it through content, actions, and presence.
Build your brand: define your niche, share knowledge regularly, be consistent across platforms, and network authentically.
Tips: LinkedIn profile, personal website, speaking engagements, writing articles, and social media presence.
Personal brand ki: tumi professionally ki represent koro. Deliberate effort nile career e onek help kore.
